course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #10 - Happy Ghast — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #10 - Happy Ghast" — 5 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 13

lesson.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore #10 - Happy Ghast — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Today I discovered a **ghast** in the Nether — a large, floating white creature that shoots **fireballs** at you. I needed to be very careful not to get knocked off the cliffs by its explosive attacks.

I tried to deflect the fireballs back at the ghast by hitting them with my **sword**. After several attempts, I finally managed to hit one back and **defeated** the ghast. It dropped a ghast tear.

The Nether is full of **dangerous** creatures, but the ghast is one of the scariest because it attacks from far away. You need to watch the sky **constantly** while exploring.

After collecting the ghast tear, I built a small **platform** to keep myself safe from the lava below. The Nether fortress was **visible** in the distance, waiting to be explored.

I decided to head home through my **portal** before more ghasts appeared. My inventory was full of useful **materials** from this dangerous adventure in the Nether.
lesson.transcript_zh:
今天我在下界发现了一只恶魂——一种会向你发射火球的大型白色浮空生物。我需要非常小心不被它的爆炸性攻击从悬崖上击落。

我试着用剑把火球打回恶魂身上。经过几次尝试，我终于成功把一个火球打回去并打败了恶魂。它掉落了一个恶魂之泪。

下界充满了危险的生物，但恶魂是最可怕的之一，因为它从远处攻击。在探索时你需要不断注意天空。

收集了恶魂之泪后，我建了一个小平台让自己远离下面的岩浆。下界堡垒在远处可见，等待被探索。

我决定在更多恶魂出现之前通过传送门回家。我的背包里装满了这次下界危险冒险中获得的有用材料。

question.prompt: What useful item did the ghast drop when defeated?
